Bullet Point 1: Sympathy Gift Baskets: Perfect for sending heartfelt condolences, our gourmet meat and cheese gift baskets include summer sausage and hard salami, offering a comforting selection of charcuterie food items for grieving gifts for women and men.

Product Description: Elevate your gifting experience with the Gourmet Meat and Cheese Gift from Gift Basket Village. This exquisite selection is designed for food enthusiasts and those seeking unique holiday surprises. Featuring a curated assortment of premium meats and cheeses, this gift basket is perfect for creating an unforgettable cheese platter. Delight in the rich flavors of two 7 oz beef summer sausages and a 7 oz salami, complemented by four 2 oz cheese bars, including varieties like smoked gouda cheese and swiss cheese. Paired with 2 oz of crackers, this selection sets the stage for a savory charcuterie experience. This thoughtful gift serves as a perfect thank you gift basket, a sensitive miscarriage gift, or a heartfelt gesture of condolences for the loss of a mother or father. Whether you're expressing sympathy or celebrating a joyous occasion, this basket offers a versatile solution. It's an ideal choice for administrative professional day gifts, Easter baskets for teens, or even Easter basket stuffers for men. Crafted with care in the USA, each item is chosen for its superior quality and taste, ensuring a delightful experience for every recipient. This gourmet assortment is not only a perfect get well soon gift basket for women, but also a meaningful sympathy gift basket for those grieving a loss. For corporate clients or family gatherings, this meat and cheese gift basket makes an impeccable choice for holiday celebrations or summer parties. The Gourmet Meat and Cheese Gift is more than just a basket; it's a way to share delicious moments with loved ones. Perfect for food lovers, corporate gifting, or as a centerpiece for a family get-together, this basket embodies the art of thoughtful gifting. Delight someone special today with a savory journey through the world of gourmet meats and cheeses, and let them savor the taste of quality and care in every bite.

It doubles as a garlic sauce and ginger garlic paste, enhancing any meal. Bullet Point 4: TRANSFORM YOUR PLATE: Elevate breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks with Moroccan harissa sauce. Perfect for eggs, skillets, sandwiches, salads, wings, soups, tagines, pastas, and more. Use it as a pizza sauce, spaghetti sauce, or even as a marinade or seasoning for meats and veggies. Bullet Point 5: WHAT IS HARISSA SAUCE?: Unlike most hot sauces that are heavy on vinegar, harissa is a fresher Moroccan chili sauce made primarily of red chili peppers, garlic, and extra virgin olive oil. Mina's organic hot sauce is versatile and can be used as a tahini or harissa paste, adding a flavorful twist to any dish. Product Description: TRY A HOT SAUCE THAT MIGHT BE BETTER THAN ANYTHING YOU’VE EVER HAD BEFORE - Fresh chilis are the main ingredients blended into a real Gourmet Sauce; It’s bright red color and velvety gourmet texture looks stunning on your dishes

QUALITY INGREDIENTS – Authentic Moroccan home recipe contains fresh chili peppers, bell peppers, fresh garlic and Premium Extra Virgin Olive Oil

FLAVOR SO GOOD YOU CAN EAT OUT IT OF THE JAR – This amazing gourmet sauce, with the perfect amount of heat

A REAL CHILI PEPPER SAUCE - Most hot sauce brands are predomanately made with vinegar, whereas Mina Harissa is mostly made of fresh chili peppers

TRY THIS GOURMET SAUCE NOW It’s amazing ingredients, texture and flavor makes everything taste better

Harissa is the most common condiment in North African cuisine. Every region has their own recipe, but they all agree on one thing - harissa's main ingredient is spicy chili peppers. Chili peppers were introduced to North Africa from Spain in the 16th century. These peppers charmed Morocco's population in such a way that they quickly became a precious culinary component

The name 'harissa' comes from the Arabic word 'haris', which means to crush, referring to the action of crushing the chilies. Harissa comes in a variety of forms, such as a sauce, a paste, and also as a powdered spice blend which is meant to be used as a seasoning or rub or diluted with olive oil

This premium spicy hot sauce has only natural pure ingredients. It is GMO free, paleo, vegan, keto, and has low sodium

MINA HARISSA
Mina grew up on the shores of Casablanca and learned the art of cooking from her dear mother. At 16 she tasted her next door neighbor's homemade harissa and fell in love with the fiery red sauce. Mina played and experimented with the recipe until she made it uniquely hers Value: 6.0 Unit: Count

Bullet Point 1: Authentic Black Salt Flavor: Experience the bold, smoky, and umami-rich taste of premium Black Salt (Kala Namak), perfect for enhancing your favorite dishes like Indian curries, mashed potatoes, and tofu-based recipes.
Bullet Point 2: Mineral-Rich & Naturally Sourced: Packed with essential minerals, Black Salt is a natural seasoning alternative to Himalayan Pink Salt, Celtic Sea Salt, and kosher salt, providing a distinctive taste with added health benefits.
Bullet Point 3: Versatile Culinary Use: Add depth to dishes like vegan scrambled eggs, instant mashed potatoes, or Indian food. Use it in spices and seasoning blends, or sprinkle it over snacks like popcorn for a savory twist.

Bullet Point 5: Premium Quality & Coarse Texture: Sourced from the finest mineral deposits, our Black Salt boasts a coarse texture that’s perfect for use in your salt grinder or spice blends. Comes in a resealable bag to lock in freshness.
Product Description: Discover the Bold & Unique Flavor of Premium Black Salt (Kala Namak) Black Salt, also known as Kala Namak, is a mineral-rich seasoning prized for its bold, smoky flavor and subtle sulfurous aroma. This natural salt is an essential ingredient in Indian food, vegan cooking, and global cuisines, elevating every dish it touches. Whether you're crafting authentic curries, seasoning mashed potatoes, or adding depth to tofu-based recipes, Black Salt is a versatile addition to your kitchen pantry. Why Choose Black Salt? Rich in Minerals: Naturally sourced and packed with essential minerals, Black Salt is a nutrient-dense alternative to traditional salts like Celtic Sea Salt, Himalayan Pink Salt, and kosher salt. Distinctive Flavor: Its unique umami-rich and sulfurous profile makes it ideal for seasoning everything from vegan scrambled eggs to snacks like popcorn and roasted nuts. Versatile Texture: Coarse Black Salt is perfect for grinding or crushing, while also offering a satisfying crunch when used as a finishing salt. Perfect for Vegan & Plant-Based Cooking Black Salt is beloved by vegans for its egg-like flavor, making it a game-changer for dishes like tofu scramble, vegan quiches, and plant-based sauces. Its distinct taste brings authenticity to recipes without compromising on flavor. Enhance Your Culinary Creations From seasoning savory dishes like curries and soups to sprinkling over popcorn or blending into custom spice mixes with celery salt, thyme, and garlic powder, Black Salt is an indispensable part of your spice collection. A Sustainable, High-Quality Choice Packaged in a resealable bag for long-lasting freshness, our premium Black Salt is carefully selected to ensure quality and flavor. Free from additives and artificial preservatives, it’s the natural choice for health-conscious and eco-friendly cooks. Upgrade your seasoning game with the bold and distinctive taste of Premium Black Salt—a must-have for your kitchen pantry. Perfect for vegans, foodies, and culinary explorers alike!
